name: Spyro (Magic school AU)
description:
Spyro is a purple-scaled dragon with equally purple eyes, orange-yellow wings with pink membranes, and a yellow underbelly and tail spike. Spyro's snout resembles that of a crocodile's; he has yellow and pink ridges on his back, the first three on his head that are his head crests are tipped in two edges. Light purple spots are dotted along his back to the tip of his tail; his tail spade even contains four segments.

In The Legend of Spyro: Dawn of the Dragon, Spyro was given a design overhaul due to the change in game developers. He was aged up to a teenager with bigger wingspan and was given slightly larger body porportions resembling that; of the Guardian dragons. Despite looking older, he remains the same size as his younger self. His purple scales are brighter, but the rest of his design is upgraded with a few changes. The first two crests on Spyro's head now lack the edges his previous design had and are completely yellow, a change that is also shared with his back spines. The light purple spots that were on his back are absent, and two small pairs of yellow crests are growing from his scaley chest. Spyro's front half is more muscular built than his back half, and his yellow wings now stem from equally colored circular shoulders. His snout is no longer bumpy like an crocodile's, but instead smoothed out. His tail spade no longer has four lines on it and is now splitted in three-edges.

(Well, here he is, our favourite purple boy. Thumbnail by constelia on Tumblr. Yes i changed the thumbnails for him and Cynder, i like these ones better and, at least Cynder, look more like older teenagers. Also i like the headcanon that Spyro trys growing a goatee like the other guardians so why the heck not. Anways, as always please share a review and coment if you want any other characters, just specify the show/movie they are from. And I ran out of ideas for an intro which is why its so short, sorry. Have nice chatting, bye for now.)
creator: Zeronone1
